PublicRemarks: Don’t miss the opportunity to live in one of South Jersey’s most desirable towns, historic Haddonfield. Consistently named by numerous publications as one of the best places to live in New Jersey, celebrated for its exceptional quality of life, Blue Ribbon Schools, vibrant shopping scene, and outstanding restaurants. Just a short walk from the home, you’ll find tree-lined sidewalks leading to the charming Main Street, where you can enjoy boutique retail shops, art galleries, antique stores, cafés, parks, banks, seasonal fairs, and holiday activities, all in the heart of this magnificent historic downtown.  This beautifully updated 1840s Colonial-style home perfectly blends timeless character with modern comfort, offering 3 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, and a harmonious balance of classic charm and contemporary updates.  Inside, you’ll find a spacious and inviting layout featuring hardwood floors, recessed lighting, and a welcoming foyer with a powder room and custom built-ins. The large living area includes a cozy wood fireplace, while the formal dining room flows seamlessly into a fully updated eat-in kitchen with quartz countertops, custom wood cabinetry, high-end stainless steel appliances, and a wine cooler.  From the kitchen, step outside to your private, fenced-in backyard sanctuary, complete with a relaxing patio, ideal for entertaining or quiet evenings outdoors.  The second floor features a spacious primary bedroom with solid hardwood floors, a luxurious marble en-suite bath, and a walk-in closet. You’ll also find a second bedroom, a hallway linen closet, and a beautifully updated guest bath with marble floor tile.  The third floor offers a large guest bedroom that can easily double as a home office or media room. The basement provides additional storage, laundry facilities, and a semi-finished area perfect for a small office or creative workspace.  A charming front porch invites you to relax with your morning coffee or enjoy Haddonfield’s festive parades passing by.  The area in front of the home is a designated loading zone with on-street parking available. The owners hold two borough permits for overnight parking and school-hour use of the loading zone. Incoming tenants may request similar permits directly from the Borough of Haddonfield. This home can be leased furnished or unfurnished and will be available on May 1, 2026. (All negotiable).

PublicRemarks: Welcome to The Plaza Grande at Garden State Park, an exquisite 55+ community nestled inthe heart of Cherry Hill. Immerse yourself in the epitome of luxury living, where spacious oneand two-bedroom layouts await. Our distinguished 18,500-square-foot clubhouse stands as the centerpiece, offering a wealth of daily amenities. Engage in a vibrant social calendar filled with activities and gatherings, fostering the opportunity to forge connections with your neighbors and cultivate new friendships within this extraordinary community. Elevate your well-being in our state-of-the-art fitness and yoga studio or work with a private trainer in our meticulously equipped weight room. Weekly water aerobics classes are hosted in our indoor pool, providing a refreshing and invigorating experience. After a game of pickleball or tennis, unwind in our clubhouse spa, complete with a sauna and shower. Indulge in a weekly first-run feature in our movie theater or share a bottle of wine with neighbors in our refined billiards lounge and bar, replete with large TVs for catching the latest game. For our furry friends, a dedicated dog park awaits! The Plaza Grande allows you to curate a vibrant life on your terms. Located just minutes from Philadelphia, and positioned between the Cherry Hill Mall and the Town Center at Garden State Park, you have unparalleled access to entertainment, fine dining, activities, and rich historical experiences. Proximity to major commuting routes and public transportation seamlessly integrates the best of both worlds—enabling you to relish all that South Jersey and Philadelphia have to offer. Step into our brand-new condo-like apartments designed to evoke a sense of home. Revel in large modern kitchens boasting ample storage, luxurious finishes, and features that redefine apartment living. The units feature large walk-in closets and full-size washers and dryers to enhance the comfort of your living space. Our attentive maintenance staff ensures a seamless experience, handling daily trash pickup and overseeing the timely delivery of your packages and dry cleaning. Private garages and available storage units further complement the convenience of our thoughtfully designed buildings. Visit our leasing office, open seven days a week, and experience the comprehensive member service offered by our concierge desk. Discover why The Plaza Grande at Garden State Park is more than an apartment community—it's a place to call home.

Office Hours:  Monday - Tuesday - Friday 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM | Wednesday 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM | Saturday 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM | Sunday By Appointment Only.   Section 8 is available and the client must gross 2 times the monthly rent. Six-month minimum lease term
